Mutual non-disclosure and confidentiality agreement
Recitals
The parties intend to enter into discussions regarding a potential future business relationship; and
Therefore, it is agreed as follows:
Definitions and interpretation
In this agreement: confidential information means:-
Information relating to the disclosing party regarding its business, partners,
Those portions of analyses, compilations, studies,

Information of a commercially sensitive nature relating to the disclosing party obtained by observation during any visits to the disclosing party’s premises but subject always to the proviso set out in clause.
The commitment
Safekeeping
Limited internal dissemination
Prior to the disclosure of any confidential information to any such personnel,
Non-disclosure to third parties
Save as otherwise permitted herein, a receiving party shall not,
Disclose the confidential information to any third party, either directly or indirectly; or
Disclose to any person: -
The fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place between the parties;
The content of any such discussions or negotiations;
Any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to the purpose; or
That confidential information has been requested or received,
Discussions through authorised representatives only
It is understood that all communications regarding the parties’ discussions,
Exclusion from confidential information
These terms and conditions will not apply to any confidential information which:
Is in or becomes part of the public domain or is or otherwise becomes public knowledge by any means other than by breach by a receiving party or their personnel of any obligation contained herein;

Was previously or is at any time hereafter disclosed to a receiving party by any third party having the right to disclose the same provided that such source is not known to the receiving party to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with,
Is released from the provisions of this undertaking by prior written consent given by a director or authorised representative of the disclosing party;
Was otherwise independently acquired or developed by the receiving party without violating its obligations hereunder.
Return of confidential information
The receiving party shall, immediately upon receipt of notice to that effect:
Return to the disclosing party all confidential information (including all copies held);
Destroy those portions (and all copies) of any analyses, compilations, studies,
Expunge and destroy any confidential information from any computer,
No responsibility for information provided
Breach of undertaking
Notices
Any notice or other communication given or made under this agreement shall,
If delivered by hand, at the time on the date of actual delivery; or
If sent by fax, with a confirmed receipt of transmission from the receiving machine,
The provisions of this clause shall not apply in relation to the service of documents.

Background information
Provisions
Confidential information .  as used in this agreement,
Preservation of confidentiality .
Restrict disclosure of the confidential information only to those of the persons as may be absolutely necessary;
Advise all persons to whom confidential information is disclosed of the strict obligations of confidentiality hereunder;
Take such steps to protect the confidentiality of the confidential information as may be taken to protect the recipient's own confidential materials,
Report of breach.
Description of the breach,
Description of the types of confidential information that was involved in the breach (such as whether full name,
Any steps that individuals should take to protect themselves from potential harm resulting from the breach;
Description of what recipient is doing to investigate the breach,
Contact procedures for individuals to ask questions or learn additional information,
Recipient representatives.
Ownership of information .
Information not covered under this agreement .
The information is or later becomes generally available to the public,
State gives its prior written consent to the disclosure of information or the waiver of any provision of this agreement;

The information is disclosed to the recipient by a third party (except an employee or former employee of recipient or its affiliates) who is not under a legal restriction not to so disclose such information.
Fulfillment of purpose .  when requested by state,
Return all documents, copies of documents,
Certify in writing to state that the recipient has so complied; and
Not use or disclose the confidential information or transact business in any manner based upon the confidential information.
Representations and warranties .  the recipient represents,
Indemnification of state.
Insurance to be secured by the recipient .
Term .
Survival .  the restrictions and obligations under this agreement shall survive any expiration,
Injunctive relief .
Governing law .
Gender and number .
References . all references in this agreement to particular sections,
Illustrative terms . whenever the word "including",
Joint preparation.
Response to subpoena.
Notification of claims.
Assistance in litigation or administrative proceedings.
No third party beneficiaries.

Non-disclosure agreement
Confidential information.
Receiver’s obligations.  receiver shall:
Additional disclosures.  receiver may disclose confidential information if the same:
Was generally available at the time it was disclosed other than as a result of a disclosure made by receiver;
Was known to the receiver at the time it received such information,
Is disclosed with the prior written approval of vidar;
Becomes known to receiver on a non-confidential basis from a source other than vidar without breach of this agreement by receiver;
Is disclosed to a third party by vidar without restrictions against non-disclosure similar to those contained in this agreement;
Is disclosed pursuant to the order or requirement of a court; administrative agency,
Is hereafter independently developed by receiver without the aid,
Additional receivers.  an employee, director, officer, manager, member,
Intellectual property
Nothing in this agreement shall be construed as granting or conferring any rights,
All intellectual property that are original works of authorship shall be considered works made for hire (as that phrase is used in section 101 of the united states copyright act,
Receiver shall promptly disclose all intellectual property to vidar and shall make and maintain adequate and current written records of all intellectual property.
Return of confidential information.
Disclaimer.
Injunction.  receiver acknowledges and agrees that:
General.  this agreement shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with,
Confidentiality agreement 1
Confidentiality agreement
The parties maintain a supply relationship. in the frame of this cooperation,
The contract parties are obligated to preclude disclosure of confidential information to third parties.
All confidential information remains the property of the disclosing contract party.
The receiving party was already aware of or which was developed by the disclosing party itself independent of the disclosure,
Is publicly known without this agreement having been broken,
Was received by a third party without infringement of this or any other confidentiality agreement.
If the recipient is forced to expose the confidential information due to a legal regulation,
The confidential information will be provided as is.
